text.title: Tool Use Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output code.

list.item: Input: Use case description.
Action: Author Pydantic input model + typed return value.
Output: tools/<name>.py with Input + Output classes.
Decision gate: If tool has > 5 args, split into smaller tools.
Input: Tool function.
Action: Add to ToolRegistry with name, fn, input model.
Output: registry.register(<tool>).
Decision gate: If name collides with existing tool, rename before registering.
Input: Registry, target provider.
Action: Convert input model to JSON schema; wrap in provider-specific tool definition.
Output: openai_tools[] or anthropic_tools[] list ready to pass to the API.
Decision gate: If provider doesn't support tools, fall back to structured-output mode.
Input: User message + tools list.
Action: Loop: model → tool_calls? → execute → tool_result → repeat. Cap at max_iterations.
Output: Final assistant message + audit log of tool calls.
Decision gate: If ToolLoopExhausted fires, surface the final state and an explicit failure reason.
Input: Audit log rows.
Action: Aggregate per-tool latency + error rate; surface in dashboard.
Output: Per-tool dashboard panel.
Decision gate: If error rate > 5% for any tool, freeze the tool + investigate.
